title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 4.4a
paragraphs: Changes hot off the press! We’re making adjustments to some champions that have been needing some love, or maybe have been getting too much love! We are also looking at some items that have been totally ruling the Rift. And brand new skins for your favorite boy band? Check them out right here!
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.

Our new game mode, Arena, will be coming out with this patch. You’ll be able to queue up solo or with your favorite duo in a brand-new mode! Arena is a 2v2v2v2 mode, where each player will be placed in teams of two where they will then duke it out in a series of duels in different arenas on each map. Every round won will decrease the enemies’ total health, and the last team standing will be the winner! There will be different augments that players can select, making each game fun and unique!
Arena will be available on November 10 at 00:01 UTC.

We hear you! Crown of the Shattered Queen’s frequent shield has been frustrating to play against. We hope these adjustments will make it easier to counter while it still remains a strong pick-up for mages.
Mejai’s Soulstealer can allow mages to snowball exponentially so it should come with bigger risks. We’re nerfing its base stats to reflect that.
Runaan’s Hurricane has been overshadowing other items of the same caliber. On some champions, it’s overpowering. We’ve adjusted its numbers to make it a more reasonable item choice.
